mood: a clean map learning where its edges are
material_language: rounded white inset panels with soft shadows
lighting: clean diffuse daylight, scanner-flat at first glance, with tiny shadows under seams and apertures to keep the field alive
object_inventory: hairline route seams that stop at the crop edge
small footer traces and edge pinholes
negative_constraints: no desks, dashboards, office rooms, shelves, cabinets, archive walls, or prop inventories
no legible words, logos, filenames, interface labels, numbers, or alphanumeric callouts inside the finished image
do not copy the source image subject or page chrome; translate graphic massing into abstract marks
avoid crowded collage, generic software UI, and equal-weight card grids
avoid glazed ceramic habitat, paste wall, weathered plinth, glass observatory, and nocturnal reissue atmospheres
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
